name: Mifflinburg Bancorp, Inc.
summary: Mifflinburg Bancorp, Inc. operates as a bank holding company for Mifflinburg Bank and Trust Company that provides various commercial banking products and services. It offers checking, savings, individual retirement, and health savings accounts; certificates of deposits; and home, auto, medical/professional, farm/agricultural, and non-profit loans; credit cards; and insurance and wealth management services. The company operates seven offices and thirteen ATMs. Mifflinburg Bancorp, Inc. was founded in 1872 and is based in Mifflinburg, Pennsylvania.
